description_long: This jewelry object features a striking, open lattice structure that spirals upward in a double-helix form, reminiscent of a modernist sculpture. The design is composed of interlocking geometric segments, creating a visually dynamic and airy appearance. The latticework is consistent throughout, with each segment forming a polygonal ring that twists around a central axis, leaving the interior mostly hollow. The coloration is a blend of deep greens, blues, and hints of brown, giving it an iridescent, metallic look. The overall form is bold and architectural, suggesting a statement piece intended to draw attention. Its abstract, geometric motif makes it suitable for contemporary urban fashion.
description: A bold, double-helix spiral jewelry piece with open geometric latticework and iridescent metallic hues. Its abstract, architectural design makes it a striking statement accessory.
description_view_0: The spiral lattice structure is seen from an angle, highlighting the open, airy design and the twisting double-helix form.
description_view_1: Viewed head-on, the full symmetry of the double-helix and the polygonal rings is most apparent, emphasizing the central hollow space.
description_view_2: This side view accentuates the curvature and depth of the spiral, showing the layered, interlocking segments.
description_view_3: From this angle, the upper and lower spirals are clearly visible, with the open latticework creating a sense of lightness.
